sourcesContent:
const products = [
  {
    id: '1',
    name: 'Smartphone Pro Max',
    category: 'Electronics',
    price: 899,
    rating: 4.7,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511707171634-5f897ff02aa9?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    description: 'Powerful smartphone with premium camera, long battery life, and immersive display.',
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    name: 'Wireless Headphones',
    category: 'Audio',
    price: 129,
    rating: 4.5,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518448879608-8bbb2f104564?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    description: 'Comfortable over-ear headphones with noise cancellation and crisp sound.',
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    name: 'Running Sneakers',
    category: 'Fashion',
    price: 79,
    rating: 4.3,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1528701800489-20c29f6dff8c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    description: 'Lightweight sneakers built for speed, comfort, and daily training.',
  },
  {
    id: '4',
    name: 'Smart Watch',
    category: 'Wearables',
    price: 199,
    rating: 4.6,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517430816045-df4b7de1f4f9?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    description: 'Stay connected with fitness tracking, notifications, and modern styling.',
  },
  {
    id: '5',
    name: 'Designer Backpack',
    category: 'Fashion',
    price: 59,
    rating: 4.2,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512436991641-6745cdb1723f?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    description: 'Durable backpack with organized compartments for daily and travel use.',
  },
  {
    id: '6',
    name: 'Bluetooth Speaker',
    category: 'Audio',
    price: 49,
    rating: 4.4,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    description: 'Portable speaker with rich bass and up to 12 hours of playtime.',
  },
  {
    id: '7',
    name: 'Desk Lamp',
    category: 'Home',
    price: 39,
    rating: 4.1,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1524758631624-e2822e304c36?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    description: 'Modern LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness and sleek profile.',
  },
  {
    id: '8',
    name: 'Gaming Keyboard',
    category: 'Electronics',
    price: 99,
    rating: 4.8,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517336714731-489689fd1ca8?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    description: 'Mechanical keyboard with RGB lighting and responsive switches.',
  },
];

export default products;
